'''âl-n-b''' ('''kalanab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zzz|zzz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-n-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zzz|zzz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-n-b
|-
! Lemma
| kalanab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilanab|thilanab]] || [[word:jilanab|jilanab]] || [[word:shilanab|shilanab]] || [[word:kilanab|kilanab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulanab|thuthulanab]] || [[word:jujulanab|jujulanab]] || [[word:shushulanab|shushulanab]] || [[word:kukulanab|kukulanab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulanab|thulanab]] || [[word:julanab|julanab]] || [[word:shulanab|shulanab]] || [[word:kulanab|kulanab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulanab|thulanab]] || [[word:julanab|julanab]] || [[word:shulanab|shulanab]] || [[word:kulanab|kulanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelanab|thelanab]] || [[word:jelanab|jelanab]] || [[word:shelanab|shelanab]] || [[word:kelanab|kelanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholanab|thotholanab]] || [[word:jojolanab|jojolanab]] || [[word:shosholanab|shosholanab]] || [[word:kokolanab|kokolanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholanab|tholanab]] || [[word:jolanab|jolanab]] || [[word:sholanab|sholanab]] || [[word:kolanab|kolanab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholanab|tholanab]] || [[word:jolanab|jolanab]] || [[word:sholanab|sholanab]] || [[word:kolanab|kolanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlanab|thĂŠlanab]] || [[word:jĂŠlanab|jĂŠlanab]] || [[word:shĂŠlanab|shĂŠlanab]] || [[word:kĂŠlanab|kĂŠlanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalanab|thathalanab]] || [[word:jajalanab|jajalanab]] || [[word:shashalanab|shashalanab]] || [[word:kakalanab|kakalanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalanab|thalanab]] || [[word:jalanab|jalanab]] || [[word:shalanab|shalanab]] || [[word:kalanab|kalanab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalanab|thalanab]] || [[word:jalanab|jalanab]] || [[word:shalanab|shalanab]] || [[word:kalanab|kalanab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalanab|shalanab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalanab|goshalanab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalanab|gokishalanab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalanabnĂŒ|shalanabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalanabnknĂŒ|goshalanabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanabnĂŒ|gokishalanabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalanabshĂ«|shalanabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalanabnkshĂ«|goshalanabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalanabshĂ«|gokishalanabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanabro|shalanabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanabnkro|goshalanabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanabro|gokishalanabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanabmu|shalanabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanabnkmu|goshalanabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanabmu|gokishalanabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalanabsher|shalanabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalanabnksher|goshalanabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalanabsher|gokishalanabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalanabng|shalanabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalanabnkng|goshalanabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalanabng|gokishalanabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalanabya|shalanabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalanabnkya|goshalanabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalanabya|gokishalanabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalanabyam|shalanabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalanabnkyam|goshalanabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalanabyam|gokishalanabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanabnĂŒshĂ«|shalanabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalanabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalanabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanabnĂŒro|shalanabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanabnknĂŒro|goshalanabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanabnĂŒro|gokishalanabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanabnĂŒmu|shalanabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanabnknĂŒmu|goshalanabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanabnĂŒmu|gokishalanabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanabshĂ«nĂŒ|shalanabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalanabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalanabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanabshĂ«ro|shalanabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanabnkshĂ«ro|goshalanabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanabshĂ«ro|gokishalanabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanabshĂ«mu|shalanabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanabnkshĂ«mu|goshalanabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanabshĂ«mu|gokishalanabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanabronĂŒ|shalanabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanabnkronĂŒ|goshalanabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanabronĂŒ|gokishalanabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanabroshĂ«|shalanabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanabnkroshĂ«|goshalanabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanabroshĂ«|gokishalanabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalanabromu|shalanabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalanabnkromu|goshalanabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalanabromu|gokishalanabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalanabmunĂŒ|shalanabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalanabnkmunĂŒ|goshalanabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalanabmunĂŒ|gokishalanabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalanabmushĂ«|shalanabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalanabnkmushĂ«|goshalanabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalanabmushĂ«|gokishalanabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalanabmuro|shalanabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalanabnkmuro|goshalanabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalanabmuro|gokishalanabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
